name: Pi Integration Pivot
description: Replaced custom Node.js engine with Pi coding agent as core engine. Rewrote Rust IPC layer for Pi RPC protocol (JSON lines over stdin/stdout), created Pi extensions for safety and project context, rewired React to consume Pi events.
notes: Pi spawned in RPC mode from Tauri with --mode rpc -e tide-safety.ts -e tide-project.ts
packages/shared/ slimmed to only region-tag types
File tree/editor use Rust native std::fs (not Pi tools)

tasks.title: Install Pi as project dependency
tasks.description: pnpm add -w @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent. Binary available at node_modules/.bin/pi.

tasks.title: Create tide-safety.ts Pi extension
tasks.description: Pi extension that intercepts tool_call events, classifies tools by safety level, reads TIDE.md for policy, uses ctx.ui.confirm() for approval dialogs.

tasks.title: Create tide-project.ts Pi extension
tasks.description: Pi extension that ensures .tide/ directory, injects TIDE.md and pinned tags into system prompt via before_agent_start, registers tide_tags custom tool.

tasks.title: Rewrite Rust Pi connection layer
tasks.description: Rewrote sidecar.rs (spawn Pi in RPC mode) and ipc.rs (PiConnection with stdin/stdout JSON lines). Deleted stream.rs. Removed bytes/tokio-util from Cargo.toml.

tasks.title: Rewrite Tauri commands in lib.rs
tasks.description: 8 commands: send_prompt, abort_agent, get_pi_status, get_pi_state, respond_ui_request, open_workspace, fs_list_dir, fs_read_file. Background task reads Pi events and emits Tauri events.

tasks.title: Rewire React to consume Pi events
tasks.description: Rewrote ipc.ts, created pi-events.ts, rewrote stream.ts/approvalStore.ts, updated AgentPanel/ApprovalDialog/App.tsx/FileTree/engine store/logStore.

tasks.title: Cleanup: archive engine, slim shared, update build
tasks.description: Archived apps/engine/ to _archive_engine/. Removed protocol.ts, stream.ts, types/tool.ts from shared. Updated root package.json build scripts.

tasks.title: Fix dead API calls and update documentation
tasks.description: Fixed contextStore.ts (no-op), regionTagStore.ts (local-only), exported getPiState. Rewrote PROJECT.md and all phase files for Pi architecture. Created TIDE.md.
